/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/combined.dir/src/Bench/combined.cpp.o CMakeFiles/combined.dir/src/Bench/EmaSearchStrBenchmark.cpp.o CMakeFiles/combined.dir/src/Bench/FactorizeBenchmark.cpp.o CMakeFiles/combined.dir/src/Commands/CdCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/combined.dir/src/Commands/ClearCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/combined.dir/src/Commands/HistoryCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/combined.dir/src/Shell.cpp.o -o combined
